calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petitioner: Roger Goldberg and Protected Person Gerda Goldberg appeared in Propria Persona.

Respondent: Lacy Burke appeared in Propria Persona.

Petitioner, Protected Person and Respondent were sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards from the protected persons: Roger Goldberg and Gerda Goldberg, their Residence located at 125 Merced Hill So., San Francisco, CA and Roger Goldberg's job or workplace.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail.

Expires October 26, 2014.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Off Calendar
